description: Style NotePractical women like their stylish shoes to also take care of comfort and ease, and these shoes for women from gliders meet all those requirements. On an adventurous day out or while hitting the gym, these shoes keep you looking good while giving you easy mobility.Product DetailsRound blunt toed brown shoe with synthetic braided upper, central lace-ups, overlays, perforations on the toe region, decorative stitched detailing and reinforced overlay at the heel counterBranding on the lateral side of the shoeSoft footbed with padded inner and tongueThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole diamond shaped lugs and conical nubsComes with a shoe bagMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when required
